steps.title: Create your order

steps.body: A courier collects your parcel or you drop it off at the nearest pickup point.

cta.title: Ready to ship with confidence?
cta.body: Track your parcel in seconds or contact us to design a tailored offer.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Can't find your answer here? Drop us a line — we get back within 24 hours.

items.q: How do I find my tracking number?
items.a: It is sent to you by email when your parcel is shipped. It starts with TS, followed by 9 digits and 2 letters for the destination country (e.g. TS947261583FR).

items.q: How long do international deliveries take?
items.a: Standard international deliveries take 3 to 7 business days depending on the destination. Express options are available on most corridors.

items.q: What if my parcel is lost or damaged?
items.a: Every shipment is insured up to its declared value. A claim can be opened from your dashboard or via the contact form.

items.q: Can I track several parcels at the same time?
items.a: Yes, your admin dashboard lets you manage all your orders and their tracking events in parallel.

items.q: Are your services available to individuals?
items.a: Public tracking is available without sign-up. To ship as an individual, contact us and we'll point you to the right plan.
All data is encrypted in transit and at rest, and stored in the European Union according to GDPR. Only authorised admins can access it.

terms.title: Terms of service
terms.intro: These terms govern the use of the Trackship service by visitors and administrators.

sections.heading: 1. Purpose
sections.body: Trackship is an online service for shipment tracking and order management by an authenticated administrator. These terms set out the rules of use for anyone consulting the public tracking page or using the administration dashboard.

sections.heading: 2. Acceptance
sections.body: Use of the service implies full and unreserved acceptance of these terms. If you do not accept all or part of the terms, you must refrain from using the service.

sections.heading: 3. Description of the service
body:
- A public tracking page accessible without registration, allowing the status of an order to be checked from its tracking number.
- A dashboard reserved for authorised administrators allowing the creation, modification and tracking of orders as well as the generation of invoices.

sections.heading: 4. User obligations
body:
- Use the service only for legitimate purposes.
- Not attempt unauthorised access to other users' data or to the administrator area.
- Not disrupt the operation of the service through unauthorised automated actions.

sections.heading: 5. Availability
sections.body: Trackship makes its best efforts to ensure the service is available 24/7, without being able to guarantee absolute availability. Interruptions may occur, in particular for maintenance operations or in cases of force majeure.

sections.heading: 6. Liability
sections.body: Trackship cannot be held liable for indirect damages resulting from the use or impossibility of using the service. Trackship's liability is limited to direct and foreseeable damages.

sections.heading: 7. Personal data
sections.body: The processing of personal data is detailed in the Privacy Policy accessible from the footer of the site.

sections.heading: 8. Modifications
sections.body: These terms may be modified at any time. The applicable version is the one in force on the date the service is used.

sections.heading: 9. Governing law
sections.body: These terms are governed by French law. Any dispute falls within the jurisdiction of the French courts.

privacy.title: Privacy policy
privacy.intro: Trackship is committed to protecting your personal data. This policy informs you about how we collect, use and protect it.

sections.heading: Data controller
sections.body: Trackship — 10 rue de la Logistique, 75001 Paris, France. For any question about your data: contact@trackship.com.

sections.heading: Data collected
body:
- Contact data sent via the contact form (name, email, subject, message).
- Shipment data entered by the administrator (recipient, address, origin, destination, status, tracking events).
- Technical data necessary for the operation of the service (admin session cookies, language preference).

sections.heading: Purposes
body:
- Reply to requests sent through the contact form.
- Allow the public tracking of a shipment by tracking number.
- Manage shipments and issue invoices.
- Improve the quality of the service.

sections.heading: Legal bases
sections.body: Processing is based on the performance of the carriage contract (shipment management), your consent (contact form) and Trackship's legitimate interest (security, service improvement).

sections.heading: Retention periods
body: Data is kept for the following periods:

- Contact messages: 12 months after the last exchange.
- Shipment data: 5 years for accounting and tax reasons.
- Session cookies: 7 days.

sections.heading: Recipients
body: Your data may be shared with:

- Our technical sub-processors: Supabase (database and authentication, hosted in the EU) and Vercel (site hosting).
- Our logistics partners in charge of transport, limited to strictly necessary information.
- Administrative or judicial authorities when required by law.

sections.heading: Your rights
body: Under the GDPR, you have the following rights:

- Right of access, rectification and erasure of your data.
- Right to restrict and object to processing.
- Right to data portability.
- Right to lodge a complaint with the CNIL (or your national data protection authority).
To exercise these rights, write to contact@trackship.com.

sections.heading: Cookies
sections.body: Trackship uses only cookies strictly necessary for the operation of the service (authentication session, theme and language preferences). No third-party advertising or analytics cookies are set.

sections.heading: Security
sections.body: Your data is encrypted in transit (TLS) and at rest. Access to the administration dashboard is protected by authentication and restricted to authorised administrators.

chatbot.title: Trackship support
chatbot.subtitle: Instant answers to your questions
chatbot.welcome: Hi! I'm the Trackship assistant. Ask me anything about tracking your parcel or click one of the suggestions below.

suggestions.how_to_track: How do I track my parcel?
suggestions.not_found: My code isn't found — what now?

answers.how_to_track: Click "Track my parcel" on the home page, type your tracking number (format: TS + 9 digits + 2 country letters, e.g. TS947261583FR) and submit. You'll see the current status and the full history.
answers.format: Every tracking number follows TS + 9 digits + 2 letters for the destination country (ISO). Example: TS947261583FR for France, TS123456789DE for Germany.
answers.statuses: Possible statuses are: Pending (created), Picked up, In transit, Out for delivery, Delivered, Delivery failed, or Returned. The timeline on the tracking page details every step with its date and location.
answers.delivery_time: Delivery times depend on the route: 24-72 h for domestic shipments, 3-7 working days for international. An estimated date is shown on your tracking page.
answers.not_found: First, double-check the format (TS + 9 digits + 2 letters). If it looks right but no order shows up, contact the sender — the parcel may not have been registered in our system yet.
answers.unknown: I didn't quite understand. Here are the topics I can help with — feel free to click one:
